understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to complete each level by positioning all selectable pieces so that every goal tile marked with a `+` was occupied simultaneously, producing a WIN for the level and ultimately finishing the full KA59 run.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement/interaction was driven by selecting and moving pieces on a grid: CLICKing on a coordinate could either select a piece or command the currently-selected piece to move to that target square, but moves only succeeded if the path/rules allowed it (otherwise the piece stayed put and the step was still consumed). Obstacles/walls blocked movement, and some CLICK targets had no effect because they were unreachable/invalid under the movement constraints; efficient selection switching and valid moves were required due to a limited step budget.

Agent explained goal and mechanics.

understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to complete each level by positioning all selectable pieces so that every goal tile marked with a `+` was occupied simultaneously, producing a WIN for the level and ultimately finishing the full KA59 run.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement/interaction was driven by selecting and moving pieces on a grid: CLICKing on a coordinate could either select a piece or command the currently-selected piece to move to that target square, but moves only succeeded if the path/rules allowed it (otherwise the piece stayed put and the step was still consumed). Obstacles/walls blocked movement, and some CLICK targets had no effect because they were unreachable/invalid under the movement constraints; efficient selection switching and valid moves were required due to a limited step budget.
